Some fathers went to Master Cosmas the lawyer and asked him 172. THE LIFE OF THE ABOVE-MENTIONED about Abba Theodore the philosopher and Zoflos the reader: which COSMAS, THE LAWYER of the two had progressed farther in the practice of asceticism?
